nodeList.label: Artificial Intelligence
nodeList.name: Artificial Intelligence
nodeList.description: The broad field of creating systems that can perceive, learn, reason, plan, communicate, generate, decide, or act in ways associated with intelligence.

nodeList.label: Symbolic AI
nodeList.name: Symbolic AI
nodeList.description: AI based on explicit symbols, rules, logic, and structured knowledge.

nodeList.label: Machine Learning
nodeList.name: Machine Learning
nodeList.description: AI systems that learn patterns from data rather than relying only on hand-written rules.

nodeList.label: Search, Planning and Optimization
nodeList.name: Search, Planning and Optimization
nodeList.description: Methods for finding good actions, paths, plans, or solutions across possible states.

nodeList.label: Knowledge and Reasoning
nodeList.name: Knowledge and Reasoning
nodeList.description: Methods for representing facts, uncertainty, causality, explanations, and inference.

nodeList.label: Robotics and Embodied AI
nodeList.name: Robotics and Embodied AI
nodeList.description: AI systems that perceive, act, and learn in physical or embodied environments.

nodeList.label: Natural Language and Speech
nodeList.name: Natural Language and Speech
nodeList.description: AI for understanding, generating, translating, retrieving, and speaking human language.

nodeList.label: Computer Vision and Perception
nodeList.name: Computer Vision and Perception
nodeList.description: AI for interpreting images, video, scenes, objects, and sensory information.

nodeList.label: Generative AI
nodeList.name: Generative AI
nodeList.description: AI systems and methods that generate new text, images, audio, video, code, data, or other artifacts.

nodeList.label: Foundation Models and General-Purpose AI
nodeList.name: Foundation Models and General-Purpose AI
nodeList.description: Large, broadly trained models and systems that can be adapted to many downstream tasks.

nodeList.label: Agentic and Multi-Agent Systems
nodeList.name: Agentic and Multi-Agent Systems
nodeList.description: AI systems involving autonomous agents and multiple interacting agents.

nodeList.label: Human-AI Interaction
nodeList.name: Human-AI Interaction
nodeList.description: Human interaction with AI systems.

nodeList.label: AI Safety, Alignment and Governance
nodeList.name: AI Safety, Alignment and Governance
nodeList.description: Cross-cutting work on making AI reliable, controllable, fair, secure, and socially governed.

nodeList.label: AGI and Future AI
nodeList.name: AGI and Future AI
nodeList.description: Future-facing ideas about general intelligence, self-improving systems, and long-term AI trajectories.
